records.ety: [L. tabularis, fr. tabula a board, table. See Table.]

defs: Having the form of, or pertaining to, a table (in any of the uses of the word).
Having a flat surface; as, a tabular rock.
Formed into a succession of flakes; laminated.
Arranged in a schedule; as, tabular statistics.
Derived from, or computed by, the use of tables; as, tabular right ascension.
quotes: Nodules . . . that are tabular and plated.
